parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create MenuItem control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the item.

properties.name: readonly elementLabel: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the Label element of the item.

properties.name: readonly elementIcon: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the Icon element of the item.

properties.name: readonly elementText: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the Text element of the item.

properties.name: readonly elementChildren: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the Children element of the item.

properties.name: readonly parent?: Menu | MenuItem
properties.description: Gets the parent Menu or MenuItem that the item belongs to.

properties.name: readonly childrenVisible: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the dropdown children are displayed.

properties.name: active: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the menu is actived or not.
remarks: When the MenuItem is deactivated, its children are automatically hidden.
When the MenuItem is activated, the visibility of its children remains unchanged.

properties.name: disabled: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether interaction with the option is disabled. If disabled, the option will not respond to mouse clicks or keyboard selection.

properties.name: childrenLocations?: number[]
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement locations for the dropdowns

properties.name: childrenOption?: ShowAtOption
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement option of the dropdowns.

properties.name: childrenDirection?: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the input direction of children. This value does not determine the children layout; rather, it dictates how user input is handled.

properties.name: childrenIntersectEnabled?: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the intersection overlay is enabled.

properties.name: text: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the displaying text of the Text element.

properties.name: title: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the title of the Label element .

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: The visibility delay for child dropdowns. The default value is <mark>Menu.CHILDREN_VISIBLE_DELAY</mark>.

parameters.name: force
description: Forces the dropdown picker to reposition, even if it is already visible.This is useful for reflecting changes when childrenLocations, childrenOption are updated.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: The visibility delay for child dropdowns. The default value is <mark>Menu.CHILDREN_VISIBLE_DELAY</mark>.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: The visibility delay for child dropdowns. The default value is <mark>Menu.CHILDREN_VISIBLE_DELAY</mark>.

parameters.name: force
description: Forces the dropdown picker to reposition, even if it is already visible.This is useful for reflecting changes when childrenLocations, childrenOption are updated.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new menu item, a separator, or a tree of items to the menu item.

overloads.name: add(modifiers: MenuItemAddModifiers | string): MenuItem
overloads.description: Adds a separator, or a tree of items to the menu.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description: The modifiers from which the menu item will be created.

returns.description: Returns the newly created MenuItem that was added to the menu.

overloads.remarks: If the parameter is '--', a separator will be added to the menu.

overloads.name: add(item: MenuItem): void

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The MenuItem to be added to the menu.

overloads.remarks: This method removes the menu from its current parent, if one exists, before adding it to the new parent.

methods.name: remove(): void
methods.description: Removes the option from its parent. If it has no parent, calling <mark>remove()</mark> does nothing.

methods.name: getActiveItem(): MenuItem | undefined
methods.description: Gets the active child item in the menu.
methods.returns: Returns <mark>undefined</mark> if no active menu exists.

methods.name: getDeepestActive(): MenuItem | undefined
methods.description: Gets the most deeply nested active menu in the menu tree.
methods.returns: Returns <mark>undefined</mark> if no active menu exists.
